messages.content:
translate 現在は持てる力の 全てを「ギョウ」に 注いでようやく ヒソカの「イン」を 見破れる程度の レベルだけど.
この調子で 修練を積めば 「ギョウ」を行いながら 戦えるように なりますよ

Currently, I can only detect Hisoka's "In" to the extent that I pour all of my available power into "Gyo". However, if I continue to train in this manner, I will eventually be able to fight while performing "Gyo".

translate 「ギョウ」は未知の相手と一戦交える時の常套手段です.
相手の能力を知ろうとせずに戦っていては到底常勝は望めませんからね

"Gyo" is a standard method used when engaging in a battle with an unknown opponent. It is impossible to expect consistent victories without attempting to understand the opponent's abilities, after all.
translate 相手の能力を 知ろうとせずに 戦っていては到底 常勝は望めませんからね
If you fight without attempting to understand the opponent's abilities, it is impossible to expect consistent victories.
translate わかりましたね まずは「レン」の習得！そして応用技の 「ギョウ」を覚える！
Understood! First, let's focus on mastering "Ren"! Then, we can learn the advanced technique of "Gyo" as an application skill!

translate そして 第２の質問 「ヒソカと同じ 能力を使える ようになるか？」
答えは Ｙｅｓでもあり Ｎｏでも わります
And now, the second question: "Will I be able to use the same abilities as Hisoka?" The answer can be both "Yes" and "No."
translate 答えは Ｙｅｓでもあり Ｎｏでも わります
The answer can be both "Yes" and "No."
ヒソカの能力が 何であれ ネン能力を 用いている限り 同じ念の使い手ならば 覚えられるはずです
Regardless of what Hisoka's ability is, as long as you are a user of Nen, there is a possibility of learning and acquiring similar abilities.
translate  ヒソカの能力が 何であれ ネン能力を 用いている限り 同じネンの使い手ならば 覚えられるはずです
Regardless of what Hisoka's ability is, as long as you are a user of Nen, there is a possibility of learning and acquiring similar Nen abilities.
ただし あくまでそれは 可能性がゼロではない というだけの話です
However, it is important to note that this is merely a discussion of the possibility, and it does not guarantee that you will definitely be able to learn and acquire similar Nen abilities as Hisoka.
translate ただし あくまでそれは 可能性がゼロではない というだけの話です
However, it is important to note that this is just a discussion of the possibility, as it is not completely impossible to achieve.
translate ネンのうりょくは その人の個性に 大きく影響され ます
Nen abilities are greatly influenced by an individual's personality and traits.
translate 一人一人好きなことや 得意な分野が違うように ネンにも得手不得手が あるのです
Just as each person has different preferences and areas of expertise, Nen abilities also have their strengths and weaknesses.
translate だからネンのうりょくの 種類によっては ヒソカが５年で覚えた ことでも私なら１０年かかる かもしれないしあるいは 一生かけても修得できない かももません
Therefore, depending on the type of Nen ability, what Hisoka has learned in five years might take me ten years, or perhaps I may never be able to master it even if I spend my whole life trying.

translate ネンのうりょくは その人の個性に 大きく影響され ます.
一人一人好きなことや 得意な分野が違うように ネンにも得手不得手が あるのです.
だからネンのうりょくの 種類によっては ヒソカが５年で覚えた ことでも私なら１０年かかる かもしれないしあるいは 一生かけても修得できない かももません

Nen abilities are greatly influenced by an individual's personality and traits. Just as each person has different preferences and areas of expertise, Nen abilities also have their strengths and weaknesses. Therefore, depending on the type of Nen ability, what Hisoka has learned in five years might take me ten years, or perhaps I may never be able to master it even if I spend my whole life trying.

もし真剣に ネンを極めたいなら 誰かの能力をマネ しようとするのでは なく
まず 自分の資質を 見極めることが 大切です！
If you truly want to master Nen, it is important to first assess your own qualities rather than trying to mimic someone else's abilities. Understanding your own aptitudes is essential.
tranlslate まず 自分の資質を 見極めることが 大切です！
First and foremost, it is important to assess and understand your own qualities.
translate それら全てが 君達のネンを 形づくるのです！
All of these aspects shape your Nen abilities!
translate 君達はまだ 発展途上です 器もできて いない
You are still in the process of development. Your vessel has yet to be formed.
translate 君達はまだ発展途上です器もできていない できるだけ 自分の器を 大きく育てなさい
You are still in the process of development, and your vessel has yet to be formed. Do your best to nurture and expand your vessel as much as possible.
what vessels mean, its sound kinda weird, maybe its japanese slang or smth

I apologize if my previous response was unclear. In this context, "vessel" refers metaphorically to one's capacity or potential. It is about developing and expanding your abilities and potential in order to accommodate and manifest stronger Nen abilities.
translate そのための 修行なのです ガンガン鍛練に 励みなさい そして 同じくらい 遊んで人生を 楽しみなさい
That is why training is necessary. Engage in rigorous practice and strive to improve. But at the same time, remember to have fun and enjoy life to the fullest.
